title: Create a dashboard from a dashboard view

posts.author: KassidyH (Kassidy Hancey)
posts.cookedHtml: It’d be so convenient and cool if you could convert the dashboard view on a board to be it’s own dashboard. I have a bunch of widgets I created within a board that I’m realizing would be really helpful to have on a higher level dashboard that connects to multiple boards. Instead of creating all these widgets again from scratch, I wish I had an option on the dashboard view to migrate it all over at once.
